nasb.text: the men in ambush hurried and rushed against Gibeah; the men in ambush also deployed and struck all the city with the edge of the sword.

esv.text: Then the men in ambush hurried and rushed against Gibeah; the men in ambush moved out and struck all the city with the edge of the sword.

cnv.text: 伏兵急忙衝入基比亞，用刀擊殺了全城的人。

ccb.text: 那些伏兵迅速冲进基比亚，杀了全城的人。
